name: DataSprint 2026
description: Participated in a one-week datathon organized by Strathmore Data Community and iLab Africa. Built a multiclass ML model predicting financial outcomes for Kenyan adults using the 2024 FinAccess Household Survey. Our team was selected to present findings.

name: AccessMap Nairobi
description: A React + Vite team project mapping venue accessibility across Nairobi for people with disabilities. Contributed six core components as Member B, implementing accessibility-first design principles.

name: React Portfolio
description: A personal portfolio web application built with React.js showcasing projects, skills and contact information. Features a responsive design with smooth navigation and a project slider built using react-slick.

name: Stock Market App
description: A React application built using Chart.js, Axios and React Router that fetches and visualizes stock market data from the Yahoo Finance API. Includes dynamic routing and interactive charts.

name: MRV Framework Report
description: A report highlighting the events of the SMART- Cornell University and USIU students in addressing bankability of carbon credits in the rangelands
